CreateModelVersion.storageBucket: BOS bucket where the model is stored
CreateModelVersion.storagePath: Storage path within the BOS bucket
CreateModelVersion.source: Source of this model version; UserUpload: uploaded by user
CreateModelVersion.modelMetrics: Model metrics in JSON format. Example (Metrics and Dataset fields are user-defined): {"Results":[{"Metrics":{"loss":2.13,"lr":0.0005},"Dataset":{"DatasetId":"ds-xxx"}}]}
